residualRisks: Herdr theme tables are a manual port and will drift from upstream
Silent CLI/script failures in plugin mode

reviewFindings: P0: src/app.rs:224-233 - feature bodies are placeholders inside shell; extract FeatureView before Explorer/SCM
P0: src/theme.rs (~525 LOC) - ~39% of codebase; unused TOKEN_NAMES/token/Serialize and pub palette constructors; fence or shrink
P0: Cargo.toml has-nerd-font - pulls clap/pest/serde_json5 for boolean NF detect (src/icons.rs); replace or feature-gate
P1: src/host.rs LaunchContext - workspace_id/tab_id/plugin_id/entrypoint_id/is_plugin unread; slim until needed
P1: src/lib.rs - over-broad pub modules/reexports for a single-binary plugin
P1: README.md module table drifts from src/ (missing ui, herdr_cli)
P1: src/feature.rs:60-62 icon_double_width is not per-icon; simplify or fix
P1: no unit tests for pure parsers (host context, theme parse, Feature nav)
P2: src/app.rs footer debug chrome; layout one-liner module; open-corral.sh zoom/python host hacks
note: plan.md and progress.md missing at review time
childReport.manualNotes: Suggested target map centers on shell/ + feature/{explorer,scm,github}/ + herdr/ + theme/ split so Explorer can land without rewriting the event loop.
